TheGrievedPrinceofYuancheng[元城哀王] was[Cao] Li. In the second year of theera [221] he was enfeoffed asDukeof Qin [秦公], andJingzhao commandery[京兆郡] became part of his fiefdom. In the third year [222], he was changed to becomePrinceofJingzhao[京兆王]. In the sixth year [225], his fief changed toPrinceofYuancheng[元城王]. In the third year of theera [229], he died. In the fifth year [231],[Cao] Ti, son of thePrinceofRencheng[任城王],[Cao] Kai, inherited the succession of[Cao] Li. In the sixth year [232], he changed fief toPrinceofLiang[梁王]. During the,, anderas, the fief gradually increased, joining with the previous for a total of four thousand and five hundred households.
